hero.title: Where Technology Leaders Connect
hero.subtitle: Join 510+ CTOs and technology leaders in Romandy for insightful discussions, networking, and growth opportunities.

about.title: About the Community
about.description: Welcome to all CTOs and aspiring CTOs! We are an online and in-person group hosting discussions and speaking events on topics such as technical leadership, recruiting, leveraging technology, architecture, building teams, and more.

topics.title: What We Cover
topics.leadershipDesc: Navigating the challenges of leading engineering teams and organizations
topics.architectureDesc: Designing scalable, resilient systems for modern businesses
topics.recruitingDesc: Attracting, hiring, and retaining top engineering talent
topics.technologyDesc: Strategic adoption of AI, cloud, and emerging technologies
topics.teamsDesc: Creating high-performance engineering cultures and teams
topics.strategyDesc: Aligning technology decisions with business goals and vision

cta.title: Ready to Connect?
cta.subtitle: Join our community of technology leaders in Romandy. Meet peers, share experiences, and grow together.

footer.organizers: Organized by Anthony Dupré and team
